name: Adreana's Greek Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 oz feta cheese - drained and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chicken in water that covers it, adding 1 bay leaf. Bring to a boil and cook for 30 minutes or until juices run clear. Cool, then remove the skin. Alternatively, cook the chicken in a frying pan until fully cooked, cutting into bite-sized pieces.
2. Cook the noodles and drain.
3. Add all ingredients to the cooked pasta and mix well. Use about half the dressing amount, then place the remainder on the table for those who want more. Serve warm or cold. Serves 6.
